prediction.reason: Mercedes has dominated the 2026 Chinese Grand Prix weekend thus far, securing a front-row lockout in Sprint Qualifying and leading the sole practice session. While Lando Norris won the season opener in Australia, the Mercedes W17 appears to have a significant power unit advantage in Shanghai. Max Verstappen and Red Bull have struggled significantly with pace, describing their performance as a 'disaster,' leaving Norris as the most likely challenger to the Mercedes duo.
